info.title: OsCompanyFinder API
info.description: Internal API for OsCompanyFinder, a B2B lead-generation SaaS. Generated directly from the route handlers under app/api/** — every schema here reflects what the code actually reads/returns, not a hand-written guess.

servers.description: Same origin as the web app

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Bulk email campaigns sent via each company's own SMTP sender

tags.name: Email
tags.description: Direct single/bulk lead outreach and the Resend transactional webhook

tags.name: Senders
tags.description: Per-company SMTP sender configuration, verification, and soft-limit acknowledgments

tags.name: Export
tags.description: Lead data export (CSV/XLSX) and export history

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Company plan, invoices, and billing status (company_admin only)

tags.name: Cron
tags.description: Background worker triggered by an external cron, not by users

cookieAuth.name: sb-access-token
cookieAuth.description: Session-based auth via Supabase Auth cookies set after logging in through the web app (see lib/auth.ts: getSession()/requireAuth()/requireAdmin()/requireActiveAccount()). There is no API key or bearer token to pass manually for these routes — they are only callable from an authenticated browser session.

cronSecret.description: Used ONLY by the /api/campaigns/process worker route. Requires header `Authorization: Bearer <CRON_SECRET>` matching the CRON_SECRET env var (see app/api/campaigns/process/route.ts). Entirely separate from user session auth above — a valid user cookie does not authorize this route, and this bearer token does not authorize any other route.

sent_count.description: Only updated once the campaign fully completes -- see recipient_counts for live progress

opened_count.description: Always 0 for SMTP-sent campaigns -- no delivery webhook exists for plain SMTP

resumes_tomorrow.description: True when recipients remain queued and the sender's technical_ceiling is exhausted for today. Omitted/false for admin's cross-company view.

EmailSender.description: smtp_password is never included in any response.

domain_id.description: Unused -- carried only for schema-sketch compatibility, no email_domains table exists

daily_limit.description: Advisory/soft limit -- overridable by the company after acknowledging the spam-flagging risk

sent_today.description: Computed, not a DB column -- only present on GET /api/senders

RequiresAcknowledgment.description: 409 response shape from /api/email/campaigns and /api/send-email when a batch would cross the sender's advisory daily_limit and no acknowledgment exists yet today.

get.summary: List leads for the caller's company (all companies for admin), optionally filtered by status.

patch.summary: Update editable fields on a single lead (scoped to the caller's company).

delete.summary: Delete a single lead (scoped to the caller's company).

get.summary: List all leads for the caller's company (all companies for admin), unpaginated.

delete.summary: Bulk-delete leads by id (scoped to the caller's company).

post.summary: Start a Google Places lead-generation job for a category+location. Runs in the background via next/server's after(); poll GET /api/scrape/{jobId} for progress.

403.description: Scrape limit reached for this month, or account suspended/expired

get.summary: Get a scrape job's status/progress.

500.description: Job not found or server error

get.summary: Count of the caller's company's scrape jobs currently pending or running.
List email templates for the caller's company (all companies for admin).

patch.summary: Update a template (fields other than id are applied as-is).

get.summary: List campaigns for the caller's company (all companies for admin), each enriched with live recipient_counts and resumes_tomorrow.

post.summary: Save a campaign as a draft, or queue it for immediate sending through the company's verified SMTP sender.
post.description: When send_now is true: requires a verified sender (403 otherwise), checks the plan's monthly email limit (403), then if the batch would cross the sender's advisory daily_limit and no acknowledgment exists yet today, returns 409 requires_acknowledgment instead of queuing anything. Sending is asynchronous -- this route only enqueues campaign_recipients rows; app/api/campaigns/process actually sends them.

400.description: Campaign name required / no template selected / no matching leads with an email

403.description: No verified sending mailbox configured, or plan email limit reached

409.description: Batch would cross the sender's advisory daily limit -- caller must POST /api/senders/acknowledge-limit then retry

get.summary: Get a single campaign plus its last 100 email_events, recipient_counts, and resumes_tomorrow.

delete.summary: Delete a campaign. Only allowed while status is 'draft'.

500.description: Server error (also returned if the campaign isn't a draft, since the delete simply matches 0 rows)

post.summary: Send a single direct outreach email (or a small array of recipients) through the company's verified SMTP sender, synchronously.
post.description: Unlike campaigns, this route has no queue behind it -- it sends immediately inside the request. Past the sender's advisory daily_limit it requires an acknowledgment (409); once the sender's technical_ceiling is genuinely exhausted for the day it's a flat 429, since there is nothing to defer to tomorrow.

leadId.description: If provided, marks this lead mail_sent=true and status=contacted

400.description: to, subject and body are required

403.description: No verified sending mailbox configured, or plan email limit reached

409.description: Would cross the sender's advisory daily limit -- POST /api/senders/acknowledge-limit then retry

500.description: Send failed or credentials could not be decrypted

post.summary: Resend transactional-email webhook receiver (delivered/opened/clicked/bounced/complained). Not used by SMTP campaign sends.
post.description: TODO: verify schema -- exact payload shape is defined by Resend's webhook format, not this codebase; documented here from how the handler reads it (type, data.tags[], data.to). No authentication is enforced on this route in code (no requireAuth() call) -- it is a public endpoint that trusts the payload shape.

200.description: Always returns { ok: true }, including for payloads it silently ignores (unmapped event type, missing company_id/email)

get.summary: Get the caller's company's SMTP sender (admin may pass ?company_id= to view any company's).

200.description: OK (null if no sender configured yet)

post.summary: Create or update the company's SMTP sender. Always resets status to 'pending' -- call /api/senders/verify afterward.

smtp_password.description: Plaintext in the request; encrypted at rest server-side and never returned by any route

400.description: Missing required fields, or company_id is required

post.summary: Verify the company's SMTP sender by connecting and sending one real test email to its reply_to address.

500.description: Server error / credentials could not be decrypted

post.summary: Log that the caller accepted the risk of sending past the sender's advisory daily_limit today. Called right after the user clicks 'Proceed at my own risk'; the caller then retries the original send/queue request.

403.description: Sender belongs to a different company

get.summary: Send a small batch of queued campaign_recipients through each verified, under-quota sender. Triggered every ~5 minutes by an external cPanel cron, with a once-daily Vercel cron as fallback.
get.description: Not callable by end users. Caps total sends per invocation at EMAIL_MAX_SENDS_PER_RUN, hard-stops each sender at technical_ceiling, and skips any sender that's past its advisory daily_limit without today's acknowledgment.

200.description: OK -- always returns ok:true even when nothing was queued to send

401.description: Missing or wrong Authorization bearer token

get.summary: Export the caller's company's leads as a CSV or XLSX file, with optional filters.

403.description: Export limit reached for this month, or account suspended/expired

get.summary: Last 50 export actions for the caller's company, derived from usage_logs.
Current calendar month's scrape/email/export counts for the caller's company.
The caller's plan's scrape/email/export limits (nulls for admin, meaning unlimited).
Last 200 usage_logs rows for the caller's company (all companies for admin).
Last 10 usage_logs rows for the caller's company (all companies for admin).
The caller's company's plan, current-month usage/limits, and last 20 invoices. Company users only, not admins.

400.description: No company associated with this account

get.summary: The caller's company's name/industry/location, for pre-filling the onboarding wizard.

patch.summary: Save the company's chosen industry and/or location during onboarding.

400.description: No company associated with account, or no fields to update

post.summary: Mark the caller's user record as onboarding_complete = true.

get.summary: List every company with this-month usage, from the admin_company_overview view.

post.summary: Create a company, its Supabase Auth user, and its users table record.

400.description: Missing required fields, or invalid plan

get.summary: Get a company plus its users.

patch.summary: Update allowlisted fields on a company (status, plan, fee flags, dates, notes, sales rep, industry, location).

schema.description: Any subset of these fields; unlisted fields are ignored

get.summary: List every demo company from the admin_demo_overview view.

post.summary: Create, convert, extend, or suspend a demo company, keyed by the `action` field.

200.description: OK -- response shape depends on action (create returns company_id+user_id, extend returns new_expiry, convert/suspend return {success:true})

400.description: action is required / unknown action / missing action-specific fields

get.summary: List all invoices with company name/email/plan, newest first, optionally filtered by status.

post.summary: Create an invoice for a company.

400.description: Missing required fields, or invalid invoice_type

patch.summary: Mark an invoice paid (activates the company / extends plan_end_date by a year depending on invoice_type) or cancel it.

400.description: Invalid action, or invoice already paid

get.summary: Aggregate revenue stats from the revenue_summary view.
